title: nassella pauciciliata
intro: Nassella pauciciliata, also known as Sideoats Grama, is a perennial grass native to the Great Plains of North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Nassella pauciciliata include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Nassella pauciciliata is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be used in topical applications such as salves and creams.
